persona.role: Senior Backend Engineer specializing in Next.js API Routes
persona.expertise: Next.js App Router, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, API Design, Data Validation
persona.communication_style: Technical, precise, with clear code examples

task.objective: Create a data ingestion API endpoint for the E2E Test Dashboard
task.success_criteria: - POST /api/test-results endpoint accepts test execution data - Validates API key authentication via Bearer token - Inserts execution record into test_executions table - Inserts individual test results into test_results table - Handles artifact storage references (Cloudflare R2) - Returns execution_id on success - Proper error handling with meaningful messages

context.background: The E2E Test Dashboard needs to receive test results from Playwright CI runs. A custom Playwright reporter will POST data to this endpoint after each test run. The endpoint must be secure (API key auth) and handle bulk inserts efficiently.
context.audience: The custom Playwright reporter running in GitHub Actions CI
context.constraints: - Next.js 16 with App Router (app/api/test-results/route.ts) - Neon PostgreSQL serverless database - Cloudflare R2 for artifact storage (screenshots, traces) - API key authentication required - Must handle large payloads (many test results per request)

existing_files.file: Database connection and query utilities using postgres package
TypeScript interfaces for TestExecution, TestResult, etc.
Cloudflare R2 utilities for signed URLs

database_schema.table: - id: serial primary key - run_id: text not null (GitHub Actions run ID) - branch: text not null - commit_sha: text not null - commit_message: text - triggered_by: text - workflow_name: text - status: text ('success' | 'failure' | 'running') - total_tests: integer - passed: integer - failed: integer - skipped: integer - duration_ms: integer - started_at: timestamptz - completed_at: timestamptz - created_at: timestamptz default now()

- id: serial primary key - execution_id: integer references test_executions(id) - test_name: text not null - test_file: text not null - test_signature: text (MD5 hash of file::name) - status: text ('passed' | 'failed' | 'skipped' | 'timedout') - duration_ms: integer - is_critical: boolean default false - error_message: text - stack_trace: text - browser: text - retry_count: integer default 0 - logs: jsonb - started_at: timestamptz - completed_at: timestamptz - created_at: timestamptz default now()

- id: serial primary key - result_id: integer references test_results(id) - type: text ('screenshot' | 'trace' | 'video') - filename: text - r2_key: text - mime_type: text - size_bytes: integer - created_at: timestamptz default now()

instructions.step: Create request/response TypeScript interfaces in lib/types.ts
Create insertTestResults function in lib/db.ts (bulk insert)
Create insertArtifacts function with R2 key generation

always.rule: Use TypeScript strict mode with proper typing
Handle all error cases with meaningful messages
Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
Validate all incoming data before database insertion

never.rule: Never expose internal error details to clients
Never trust client-provided IDs for foreign keys
Never use string concatenation for SQL queries

output_format.structure: 1. Type definitions (lib/types.ts additions) 2. Database functions (lib/db.ts additions) 3. API route handler (app/api/test-results/route.ts) 4. Example curl command for testing

example.explanation: Successful insertion returns the new execution ID and counts
Missing or invalid API key returns 401
Invalid JSON or missing required fields returns 400

request_schema: { "execution": { "run_id": "12345678", "branch": "main", "commit_sha": "abc123def456", "commit_message": "feat: add user authentication", "triggered_by": "push by username", "workflow_name": "E2E Tests", "status": "failure", "total_tests": 15, "passed": 12, "failed": 2, "skipped": 1, "duration_ms": 120000, "started_at": "2025-12-26T10:00:00Z", "completed_at": "2025-12-26T10:02:00Z" }, "results": [ { "test_name": "should create case successfully", "test_file": "automation/playwright/tests/case/create-case.spec.ts", "status": "passed", "duration_ms": 5000, "is_critical": true, "browser": "chromium", "retry_count": 0, "started_at": "2025-12-26T10:00:05Z", "completed_at": "2025-12-26T10:00:10Z", "logs": [ {"timestamp": 100, "level": "info", "source": "test", "message": "Starting test"} ] }, { "test_name": "should handle payment error", "test_file": "automation/playwright/tests/payment/error.spec.ts", "status": "failed", "duration_ms": 8000, "is_critical": false, "error_message": "Expected element to be visible", "stack_trace": "Error: Expected element...\n at ...", "browser": "chromium", "retry_count": 1, "started_at": "2025-12-26T10:00:15Z", "completed_at": "2025-12-26T10:00:23Z", "logs": [ {"timestamp": 100, "level": "info", "source": "page-object:PO_Payment", "message": "Submitting payment"} ] } ], "artifacts": [ { "test_name": "should handle payment error", "test_file": "automation/playwright/tests/payment/error.spec.ts", "type": "screenshot", "filename": "failure-screenshot.png", "mime_type": "image/png", "data": "base64-encoded-image-data..." } ] }
